skills_by_profile_reasoning: general-dev: cross-cutting; java: Failsafe IT module — junit-integration optional applies; java-cui: cui-test-juli-logger used; cui-http-testing applies for attack-database ITs (Plan 03)
tips: Local 'verify -Ppre-commit' does NOT run the Docker integration-tests profile (-Pintegration-tests). Integration-affecting changes (IT script assertions, mounted-config permissions/paths, Dockerfile/compose edits) pass the local pre-commit gate but are only validated in CI. Run 'verify -Pintegration-tests -pl integration-tests -am' locally before pushing any integration-affecting change.
